description: Draft specifies "by end of year" without timezone or HH:MM. Reviewers fail timing_unambiguous; market needs an explicit UTC cutoff.

input.question: Will the CPI reading come in under 2% by end of year?

reviews.reviewProse: 'End of year' is not precise enough. CPI data drops on a specific day at 8:30 AM ET — the cutoff must be pinned to that timestamp in UTC to avoid disputes about late-arriving revisions.

rubricVotes.rationale: 'End of year' lacks a specific cutoff and timezone.
No rule for CPI revisions after cutoff.

criticisms.rationale: Replace 'end of year' with '2027-12-31T13:30:00Z' or similar explicit UTC timestamp.
